entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hello Everyone! Happy to join this group! Its really exciting to see me here, I believe I would be able to contribute to SAP community in sharing my knowledge. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to transport migration cockpit project and object...
entry.content:
Hello,

in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, there is NO transport mechanism for File/Staging projects. You need to create to project again in QAS.

Regards, Sybille Lackermeier, SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Product Management

entry.title: Re: Mass deployment of sap GUI Java
entry.content:
Hello Gabriel,

The options are listed at https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_java/e665f2b67dbd4328ab6bd9e029b84581/362dd98d08e546b3b5396c479ddecf87.html

Best regards
Rolf-Martin

entry.title: Re: Import/Export Route from Dev/QA/Prod
entry.content:
Rufus, you just import the package into the production tenant. The very same way as into Test. Like a transport. One shared location for all tenants. 
You do not deploy the way as in BO -> DEV to TST / TST to PRD. 
 
Cheers, Martin

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
I am an SAP Business One  Consultant from Lahore, Pakistan. As a CA student and a commerce accounting graduate, I am keen to expand my skills and knowledge in the SAP ecosystem. I am particularly interested in learning SAP Analytics Cloud and believe that the digital skills initiative by SAP Learning is a fantastic opportunity for individuals like myself. I am eager to take on the challenge and undergo the necessary training to achieve SAP Certification.

Thank you for considering my interest in this initiative.

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS extractor on NSDM_E_MCHBH (replacement of MC...
entry.content:
Custom CDS. Check in the source if it runs at all. ABAP will give only this simple warning. 
ABAP: RODPS_REPL_TEST. Go to Last Delta for CDC and execute. You will get a clear error/message: ".... does not support delta"
 
You could simplify with one table of course, but ... there you have to have a date in the table. Maybe you can create something like I did for such cases - generic delta like. Use fisc. year / period instead of date. 
 
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-datasphere-delta-extraction/ba-p/13699391

entry.title: Re: Inbound/outbound delivery enquiries
entry.content:
@ecco_liu 

May you please help to answer this question in the context of inbound delivery process integrating to inspection process of procurement?

entry.title: Re: Data Migration Cockpit - Measurement Document - EAM/PM
entry.content:
Hello Deepak,

when you migrate from ECC to S/4HANA -> are you using the Direct Transfer approach? You talk about template, therefore you use File/Staging approach?

In both cases, if fields are not available in the predelivered migration object you need to enhance them by yourself. You use the migration object modeler (LTMOM). For both approaches we have guide how to enhance migration object.

Please check our data migration landing page: http://help.sap.com/S4_OP_DM in section "Training Material" choose relevant migration approach and look for migration object modeler.

Regars,

Sybille Lackermeier, SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Product Management

entry.title: Re: Spartacus Storefront
entry.content: is this working in CCV2?

entry.title: Re: show user name in material change log
entry.content: Hello, this question is not very clear. Maybe try give more details & explain better where you need a help? If you want to show who did the change in your report, then just check table CDHDR field USERNAME.

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Transform Data with Scripting in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: Well, I saw the script task item in the roadmap yesterday 🤔 ... there is this one, https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800003832&range=FIRST-LAST#;INNO=000D3ABE772D1EECA49B79C5EEB857C8, but the roadmap item I had seen was not for the expression editor but for the script task. I will check.

entry.title: How to calculate the time difference between the same timestamp if less than 48 hours?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there an accurate formula for calculating the difference time if less than 48 hours in same Timestamp, in SAP web intelligence?

for example, calculate if the patient's visit to the operating room for the same procedure is repeated within 48 hours.

additionally, if there are duplicates for date then avoid them.

 

Regards.

can you please suggest possible solutions.

entry.title: Re: Datasphere: transport package is locked in Exporting

entry.title: EWM in Public Cloud: Staging for Production with whole HU's
entry.content:
Hello,

in a projekt we want to have a flexible staging process to get whole HU's to the line. We want to have only one sloc so classic staging with deliveries is not our go to solution. Most kanban processes (classic or event-driven) or e.g. single order staging with PMR's deal with specific quantities. We found an indicator within our warehouse tasks ("Remove whole HU")  but 

- we are unsure how to trigger this indicator and

 

every input apreciated.

thanks and best regards

Patrick

entry.title: Detailed demo of utilising TPM, Integration Advisor for an E-2-E B2B Implementation
entry.content:
I have a B2B scenario where I want a partner which is using custom XML, let's say UBL21 Sales order, uses a third-party VAN which sends the data via as2 protocol.
Once received in CPI, post message mappings and transformations, it gets inserted into SAP as an idoc ZORDERS1.

Now to fulfill this requirement, I can use web methods solution. I am expecting some tutorial using SAP CPI and its features called trading partner management, integration advisor.

Do you have any course walkthrough or case studies with clear detailed steps to achieve this end to end?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Floor level Picking
entry.content:
Hi,

"Would storage sectioning be the best way to achieve is by create storage section FLOOR and then assigning floor level bins to the storage section. "

Nope. Because a section is not used in any way in the determination of the source storage bin. Section can only determined during putaway.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: Unable to remove attachment in "Managed Purchase Requsition" Apps in Fiori
entry.content: Did you find a solution? We are having the same issue. Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP ECC vs SAP S/4 HANA Table

entry.title: In S4 Hana Cloud Implementation Badi for Manage Business partner
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Currently Working on S4Hana Cloud.

i have issue for Implantation Badi of master data business partner, i have created custom field in the Master data business partner so my requirement when i create Master data business partner changes any field values this custom field should be  trigger the value automatically as value is = 'abap_false' when business partner changes any values that custom field should be trigger  automatically, so, here for  master data business partner could be have only two implementation Badi  when i clicked on +  search for Master Data Business partner there are only two Badis 'Validated BP Badi' & 'Badi For Validate BP'.

so, any one suggest me how do i approach for implementation Badi for that custom field and there is no Modify Badi please help me if any knew answer

entry.title: Re: SAP ECC vs SAP S/4 HANA Table
entry.content: Dear all,

entry.title: Re: Custom List entity using REUSE mode in sap MDG-S?
entry.content:
Hello,

You will need to enhance Handler Class (preferred) or Access Class for custom entity to save data in backend table for custom entity in MDG-S.

I am assuming data is getting stored in staging table once CR is submitted only issue is with data transfer to backend table from staging area.

Regards,

Sudhir

entry.title: Re: SAP ECC vs SAP S/4 HANA Table

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How can you tell when a customers name and address has been changed?
entry.content: Maybe @stephenl1 , you coul look at a BAdI such as ADDRESS_UPDATE to trigger insert, update or delete formatted address record in your custom table?

entry.title: SAC - Transporting Model & Story data is not working
entry.content:
Hi,

When I transported Story and Model from SAC-QA to SAC-PRD  , it went successful.  But when i see data in story is behaving absurd, even though data is perfectly fine in my  Model .

When i created new story, to check data and story , result is fine.

My issue is why this is happening. i cannot create every time new story which i already developed and tested in QA and just transporting.  Please help to address it.

 

Thanks

Manoj

entry.title: Re: Material Master - Mass changes in S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

If you are planning for Master Data Governance (MDG) with S/4 HANA then you can consider Master Data Consolidation (MDC) tool as well.

MDC will provide you flexibility for Mass Creation & Change both with governance & will help in defining governance for both (Central Governance & MDC).

Regards,

Sudhir

entry.title: How to edit Standard form layout

The form is F140_INT_DOCU_01. I Copied from client and named it as ZF140_INT_DOCU_0. After that i tried but i am not getting the table format. can anyone help me to solve this...

Greta

entry.title: The token in the OpenDocument URL does not work
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an application in c#. User enter de document parameters value then I add this values to opendocument url and redirect application to this open document url. Before redirection, open document url like below;

http://meyserver:80/BOE/OpenDocument/opendoc/openDocument.jsp
?sIDType=CUID
&iDocID=AX6herNbIi9KhMIsfvsf3
&lsSBegin=Date(2018,6,11)
&lsSEnd=Date(2023,6,11)
&lsMFirm=FirmTest
&lsMBrand=BrandTest
&token=blabla

I am getting token using /biprws/logon/long address then encoding this token with below c# code and add to the opendocumenturl like that.

openDocUrl = openDocUrl + $"&token={HttpUtility.UrlEncode(token)}";

When I redirect to this address, the report should be opened directly according to the token, but the token does not work and it asks me to enter the username and password. When I enter this information, the report opens as I want, but I do not want the user to re-enter the username and password in the application, I want the token I added to the url to perform this authorization process, but the token does not work. How can I solve the problem? Whether I add the token to the url or not, nothing changes and it asks me to log in again.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Authenticate via Basic Auth or Client Certificate aga...
entry.content: Thank you for your contribution! We have currently connected Azure AD to our subaccount via SAML. Are there similar options for accessing routes from CAP services via XSUAA using Basic Auth/Client Cert?

entry.title: Re: Email for Contact Person list uibb
entry.content:
Hello,

Which Data Element has been used for Email field in custom entity. If you are using standard, try copy it into custom & assign it to email field in custom entity & in genil dependent object. Activate DM & Regenerate structure after assignment.

Regards,

Sudhir

entry.title: solman_setup - Database hosts when connecting a managed system
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

our systems are running on Hana database. We have 2 or 3 servers per SID as we have configured HSR. When connecting newly installed systems to the Solution Manager, I observe very seldom behavior that defies any logic in the steps Assign Product and Assign Diagnostics Agent. 

Sometimes I only see one database host in the step Assign Product. This is usually due to missing SLD data and when I make sure all DB servers have correctly transferred SLD data, it is fixed and the servers are present there. However, when I see all DB servers correctly in this point, my expectation is to see them also in the step Assign Diagnostics Agent! However, I see all application servers and all DB servers very rarely in this point! It seems to be independent from the point Assign Product and I did not find anything specific, that makes DB Servers appear or disappear from the point Assign Diagnostics Agent!

Could you please kindly explain how this works and most importantly - provide me an answer what exactly do I have to do, in order to see the DB Servers also in the point Assign Diagnostics Agent.

Many thanks for your help and advice!

entry.title: Re: How to convert xml to table, using xml transformation, at utf-8 format.
entry.content:
How is the original XML encoded?

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

 

What is  the  current code page of AS ABAP?

entry.title: GB bank file for free to upload in BAUP
entry.content:
Hi,

Do you know a way to get the GB bank file to upload in SAP using T_code BAUP? The indications in SAP note 132012 refer to a Company, but you have to make a fairly expensive subscription and the file contains banks for countries I don't need. Does anyone know how to get this kind of file otherwise ? Many Thanks,

Isabel

entry.title: Diagnostics Agent flapping (continuously restarting)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I alsready have several occasions when the Solution Manager Diagnostics Agent is flapping and I am unable to solve this. I have checked all possible agent logs and there is NO error! The only thing I see is that it suddenly says: Exit hook called and thats it 😞

I found SAP Note 3236632 - Diagnostics Agent keeps restarting after enabling Diagnostics Agent on-the-fly

Yes, the file smdagentgroup.properties is missing, but even after I copy it as advised in SAP note 2297758, the problem is NOT fixed and the agent keeps flapping 😞

For now, the only solution I could find is to completely uninstall the agent and then reinstall it. However I prefer to know the reason for this behaviour and to know the steps how it can be fixed.

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: No field for Functional Area in the JournalEntry_Template downloaded from S4 HANA
entry.content:
The functional area field is not available in the journal entry template downloaded from the upload general journal entries app 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: No field for Functional Area in the JournalEntry_Temp...
entry.content:
The "Upload General Journal Entries" app provides a template with default headers and line items. You can upload a local file for posting after filling in the entry data. If you want to add additional field columns to the template, ensure that you use the correct technical names. Refer to the SAP Help Portal for the complete list of field names and corresponding technical names. Fields marked with two stars (**) are default fields in the template. The number next to each field indicates the character or number limit for the value you enter.


Kindly go through the below SAP help portal for your reference:-
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/41f88d19c3b64b1db1c2aa80165d9494.html?profile=20128734&locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: VALIDATE MATERIAL MASTER TEXT MM01
entry.content:
Hello @praneshti23 

 

In the new Manage Product Master Data app there is a duplicate check

'Checking for Potential Duplicates of Master Records'

Please use this instead of MM01

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps database
entry.content: Similar to this, what is the recommended approach to share data between SAP Build Apps and SAP Build Process Automation?

entry.title: Re: Transportation Load Building (TLB) within SAP IBP Response & Supply Planning
entry.content:
Regarding grouping orders together for the same delivery date.  As not all loads are fully loaded, would it be possible to group orders from future delivery dates and bring them forward?  This used to be possible in APO TLB.

This will result in fully loaded trucks and more optimised.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - General Error with Filters
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We're currently encountering an error when adding Input Controls or Story Filters. During my investigation, I noticed that this issue also occurs with the BestRunJuice_SampleModel, suggesting that it might be a general tenant issue. Does anyone have any insights on this behavior?

 

 

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) integration with SAP AI Core services: Part 3 – Measurement Reading
entry.content:
In this series of blogs, I will showcase how to integrate SAP AI Core services into SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) to develop mobile applications with AI capabilities.

  • Part 1: SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) integration with SAP AI Core services - Setup
  • Part 2: SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) integration with SAP AI Core services - Business Use Cases
  • Part 3: SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) integration with SAP AI Core services - Measurement Readings (Current Blog)

In the previous blogs, we described how to set up the environment for integrating SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) with SAP AI Core services and explored potential use cases. Starting with this blog, we will delve into the details of each use case one by one.

SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK) integration with SAP AI Core services – Measurement Readings

The main task is to create an MDK rule for analyzing measurement readings, such as automatically analyzing water meter readings . It preprocesses the images, sends them to the SAP AI Core service, and handles the response to extract and store the readings.

Code snippet of SendMeterReadingRequest.js is as below

 

import BinaryToBase64 from '../Utils/BinaryToBase64';

const IMAGE_URL_PREFIX = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";
const schema = {
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "detectedReadings": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": {
          "unit": {
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The unit of the value of meter in format 'FullName (Symbol)' . Eg: Killowatts per hour (KWH)",
          },
          "value": {
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The value of the meter. Remove leading zeros",
          }
        },
        "required": ["unit", "value"]
      }
    },

  },
  "required": ["detectedReadings"],
}

export default function SendMeterReadingRequest(context) {
  const prompt = `Analyze the image(s) provided to determine the reading displayed on the meter. It can be anolog meter or a digital one. 
  Identify and extract the reading with its corresponding unit (e.g., kWh for kilowatt-hours, m^3 for cubic meters). The value could be zero. For example: 0 psi.
  Ensure the output clearly specifies both the numerical value and the unit of measurement for accurate automated meter reading.
  `;

  const method = "POST";
  const body = {
    messages: [
      {
        "role": "user",
        "content": [
          {
            "type": "text",
            "text": prompt
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
    temperature: 0.1,
    max_tokens: 512,
    top_p: 1,
    frequency_penalty: 0,
    presence_penalty: 0,
    functions: [{ name: "format_response", parameters: schema }],
    function_call: { name: "format_response" },
  };
  const headers = {
    "content-type": "application/json",
    "AI-Resource-Group": "default"
  }
  const service = "/MDKDevApp/Services/AzureOpenAI.service";
  const path = "/chat/completions?api-version=2024-02-01";
  const pageProxy = context.getPageProxy();
  const attachments = pageProxy.evaluateTargetPath("#Control:AttachmentMeterReading/#Value");

  // Preprocess images
  const platform = context.nativescript.platformModule;
  attachments.forEach((attachment) => {
    let base64String = BinaryToBase64(context, attachment.content);
    const imageData = {
      "type": "image_url",
      "image_url": {
        "url": `${IMAGE_URL_PREFIX}${base64String}`
      }
    }
    body.messages[0].content.push(imageData);
  });

  console.log("Sending meter reading request...");
  return context.executeAction({
    "Name": "/MDKDevApp/Actions/SendRequest.action",
    "Properties": {
      "Target": {
        "Path": path,
        "RequestProperties": {
          "Method": method,
          "Headers": headers,
          "Body": JSON.stringify(body)
        },
        "Service": service
      },
      "ActivityIndicatorText": "Sending meter reading request...",
    }
  }).then(response => {
    const results = JSON.parse(response.data.choices[0].message.function_call.arguments)
    const mainPage = context.evaluateTargetPathForAPI("#Page:GeneratedServiceOrderPage");
    const cd = mainPage.getClientData();
    cd.MeterReadingResults = results.detectedReadings;
    console.log("Meter reading results:", results.detectedReadings, "\n");
    return true;
  });
}

 

 

A step-by-step breakdown:

  1. Imports and Constants:
    • BinaryToBase64 is imported from ../Utils/BinaryToBase64.
    • IMAGE_URL_PREFIX is a constant string used to prefix the base64-encoded image data.
    • schema defines the structure of the expected response from the AI service.

       

  2. Function Definition:
    • SendMeterReadingRequest is the main function that takes MDK app context as an argument.

       

  3. Prompt and Request Body:
    • The prompt is a string that describes the task for the AI service. In our case, we use plain language to ask the AI to analyze the image and extract the reading. We also request the AI to respond in the JSON data format specified in the schema.
    • method is set to "POST" as the requirement of SAP AI Core service
    • body is an object that contains the request payload, including the prompt and schema for the expected response.

       

  4. Headers and Service Details:
    • headers define the content type and resource group for the request.
    • service and path specify the endpoint for the AI service, which should be aligned with what you defined in SAP BTP Cockpit and SAP Mobile Services.

       

  5. Attachments and Preprocessing:
    • pageProxy is used to get the attachments (images) from the context.
    • The code iterates over each attachment, converts it to a base64 string using BinaryToBase64, and adds it to the request body

       

  6. Sending the Request:
    • The function logs a message indicating that the request is being sent.
    • context.executeAction is called to send the request to the AI service.
    • The response is parsed, and the detected readings are stored in the client data of the main page.

       

  7. Handling the Response:
    • The response from the AI service is parsed to extract the detected readings.
    • These readings are stored in the client data of the main page for further use.

       

Key Functions and Variables

  • BinaryToBase64: Converts binary data to a base64-encoded string.
  • IMAGE_URL_PREFIX: Prefix for base64-encoded image data URLs.
  • schema: JSON schema defining the expected structure of the AI service response.
  • SendMeterReadingRequest: Main function that processes images and sends a request to the AI service.
  • prompt: Instruction for the AI service.
  • body: Request payload containing the prompt and images.
  • headers: HTTP headers for the request.
  • service: AI service endpoint.
  • path: Path to the AI service API.
  • attachments: Images to be processed and sent to the AI service.

Code snippet of BinaryToBase64.js is as below

 

function Uint8ArrayToBase64(uint8Array) {
  let binaryString = '';
  const CHUNK_SIZE = 0x8000; // 32768

  for (let i = 0; i < uint8Array.length; i += CHUNK_SIZE) {
    const chunk = uint8Array.subarray(i, i + CHUNK_SIZE);
    binaryString += String.fromCharCode.apply(null, chunk);
  }
  return btoa(binaryString);
}

export default function BinaryToBase64(context, content) {
  let base64String = "";
  let platform = context.nativescript.platformModule;
  if (platform.isAndroid) {
    base64String = android.util.Base64.encodeToString(content, android.util.DEFAULT);
  } else if (platform.isIOS) {
    base64String = content.base64EncodedStringWithOptions(0);
  } else {  // Assume MDK Web
    base64String = Uint8ArrayToBase64(new Uint8Array(content));
  }
  return base64String;
}

 

Uint8ArrayToBase64: Converts a Uint8Array to a Base64 string by processing it in chunks.

BinaryToBase64: Converts binary content to a Base64 string, handling different platforms (Android, iOS, Web) appropriately.

In one of the pages of your MDK app, you can specify the user interface to bind the meter readings result from AI. For example,

 

        {
          "_Type": "Section.Type.SimplePropertyCollection",
          "_Name": "MeterReadingResults",
          "Visible": true,
          "Header": {
            "Items": [
              {
                "_Type": "SectionHeaderItem.Type.Label",
                "Title": "Meter Readings",
                "Position": "Left"
              }
            ]
          },
          "Layout": {
            "NumberOfColumns": 1
          },
          "SimplePropertyCell": {
            "KeyName" : "{unit}",
            "Value" : "{reading}"
          },
          "Target": "/MyApp/Rules/ImageAnalysis/GetMeterReadingResults.js"

 

Code snippet of GetMeterReadingResults.js

 

export default function GetMeterReadingResults(context) {
  const pageProxy = context.evaluateTargetPathForAPI("#Page:GeneratedServiceOrderPage");
  const cd = pageProxy.getClientData();
  if (cd && cd.MeterReadingResults) {
    return cd.MeterReadingResults[0]; // demo purpose to only get first reading read
  } else {
    return [];
  }
}

 

 

With above code snippets, we show case how to preprocesses the images, transmits them to the SAP AI Core service for analysis, and manages the response to extract and store the meter readings.

In our next blog, we will explore how to detect anomalies using a similar approach.

entry.title: Re: Design of the behavior handler - ABAP RESTful Program...

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Munich 2024 (#sitMUC) - Secure Your Spot Now!
entry.content: Looks like fixed, now it works for me, thank you!

entry.title: Workflow triggering based on custom fields in sales order item level
entry.content:
I have created a custom field "Status" in sales order item field in public cloud . I have given three dropdowns , "F" , "P" and "N" in custom field .Based on the certain selected value("F") in the dropdown I have to send the notification to approver (trigger the workflow) . 

I have used the BADI " SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF " to get new dropdown in the manage sales document workflow pre condition and I have used  "SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL" for the value . I'm not able to trigger the workflow.

SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF :

CONSTANTS: co_id TYPE if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>ty_condition_id VALUE 'CF_SWF_FLEX_IFS_BADI_COND_SAMP'.
data : ls_condition like line of ct_condition.
data : ls_parameter like line of ct_parameter.

 

ls_condition-id = 'id_Status'.
ls_condition-subject = 'Overall Status'.
ls_condition-type    = if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>cs_condtype-start_step.
append ls_condition to ct_condition.

 

*Parameter for Workflow level condition - Plant
ls_parameter-id = 'id_Status'.
ls_parameter-name = 'Overall Status'.
ls_parameter-xsd_type = if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>cs_xstype-string.
ls_parameter-service_path = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/S_SALES_ORDER_CDS'.
ls_parameter-entity       = 'S_SALES_ORDER'.
ls_parameter-property     = 'Overall Status'.
ls_parameter-mandatory = abap_false.
append ls_parameter to ct_parameter.

SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL

CONSTANTS co_id TYPE if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>ty_condition_id VALUE 'CL_SWF_FLEX_IFS_BADI_COND_SAMP' ##NO_TEXT.

 

    cv_is_true = abap_false.
   IF is_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_2 IS NOT INITIAL.
  SELECT  * INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_salesorderitem)
    FROM I_SALESORDERITEM
    WHERE salesorder = @IS_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_1.
ELSE.
  SELECT  * INTO TABLE @LT_salesorderitem
    FROM I_SALESORDERITEM
    WHERE salesorder = @IS_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_1
    AND salesorderitem  = @IS_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_2.
ENDIF.

 

READ TABLE lt_salesorderitem INTO DATA(ls_salor) INDEX 1.
READ TABLE it_parameter_value INTO DATA(ls_param_StatusItem) WITH KEY name = 'YY1_OVERALLSTATUS_SDI'.
IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
  IF ls_param_StatusItem-value = ls_salor-YY1_OVERALLSTATUS_SDI.
    cv_is_true = abap_true.
  ELSE.
    cv_is_true = abap_false.
  ENDIF.
ENDIF.

 

I had referred to this blog as well but the code which was written was not clear to me .

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/manage-s-4hana-cloud-flexible-workflow-triggers-based-on-added-field-under/ba-p/12842166 

Please help me with this .

Thanks & Regards

Shraddha Nayak

entry.title: Share data between SAP Build Apps and SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Use Case:

  1. SAP Process Automation 1: regularly read elements via SAP GUI
  2. SAP Build Apps: allow users to update elements.
  3. SAP Process Automation 2: regularly write updated elements via SAP GUI

What is the best practice approach / reference architecture for persisting the data, allowing to share between SAP Build Apps # and SAP Build Process Automation?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori deployment options and SAP Fiori front-end server strategy - UPDATE 2023
entry.content:
Hi Carola

We are analyzing whether to implement the Fiori Launchpad in BTP instead of a standalone Fiori Front-End Server (FES) 6.0 for our backend system: SAP ECC 6.0 EHP8. We have many custom Z apps currently running in the backend system that we would like to migrate to BTP, but we are unsure if this is possible or if the Fiori Launchpad in BTP will have native app compatibility with our backend. Could you provide your recommendation on whether this is the right approach or not?

Thanks in advance

Claudia

entry.title: Re: Problem availability control for internal order
entry.content:
AFAIK there is no availability control if no budget is inscribed.

  • Try to create a dummy budget of 0.01 to check on your system
  • Read 602588 - Availability control before budgeting which suggests some solutions;

entry.title: SAC Add-in for Powerpoint
entry.content:
Introduction

Hello and welcome to this blog discussing the powerful SAC Add-in tool developed by SAC to allow users to  integrate SAC with PowerPoint. In this blog I will discuss the following points:

  • How to get the add-in
  • What is the SAC add-in for PowerPoint?
  • Configurations and Set up

 

How to get the add-in

From the link below you can download and install the Microsoft add-in.

PowerPoint: https://appsource.microsoft.com/en-us/product/office/WA200007270?tab=Overview

 

What is the SAC add-in for PowerPoint?

The SAC add-in for Microsoft PowerPoint allows you to embed SAC widgets directly into your presentation slides. This ensures your slides are always up to date with accurate data from SAC, eliminating the need for manual updates. You can connect to an SAC tenant, select and filter widgets, and refresh data on demand, making your presentations dynamic and reliable.

Important things to note:

  • Table widgets cannot be used with this add-on
  • You can only use optimized stories with this add-on
  • The story must be saved to the Public folder
  • You can refresh the widget's data at any time on demand

 

Configurations and Set up

1. Open PowerPoint and, similar to the SAC add-in for Excel, you’ll be asked to enter your SAC URL

 

2. You’ll then be asked to login with your SAC tenant details. Once you log in you can see all your SAC tenants’ stories.

 

3. Select you story. In this example, we’ll use the SAP_SMPL_Planning story.

 

4. Once you click on your preferred story, you’ll get a list of the pages associated with your story.

5. You can then click on each page to see the available widgets from that SAC dashboard that can be used in PowerPoint.

 

6. You can then select the widget you want to insert and add it to your PowerPoint slide

 

7. Your slide should look like this once you’ve added your widget and combined other PowerPoint features

 

Conclusion

The SAC Add-in for PowerPoint provides an easy-to-use and powerful way to integrate SAC into your Microsoft Office workflow. By ensuring real-time data updates in PowerPoint presentations, this add-in empowers users to work more efficiently with the familiar Office interface. It helps users create dynamic presentations that support more informed and effective decision-making.

entry.title: Re: How to convert xml to table, using xml transformation, at utf-8 format.
entry.content: There is no encoding, original is russian, solved with converting source xml to xstring

entry.title: Re: Save Data from a CSV file
entry.content:
Hello Dan , there is already a blog that can help you 
check this : https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/loading-data-from-a-csv-file-into-sap-build-app-vcf-backend/ba-p/13555443
also for downlading an empty CSV file you can add a logic for Download button : 

and in the right side of this logic you can run this function to convert the headers of the CSV file into Base 64 : 
const headers = "";
const base64EncodedHeaders = btoa(headers);
console.log(base64EncodedHeaders);
NB: header is seperated by ";" like : "FirstName;LastName;Age;Role"

entry.title: Mismatch value between Inventory audit report V/S Inventory in Warehouse report SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have made two transaction GRPO and Inventory revaluation but when I was checked both report named Inventory audit report V/S Inventory in Warehouse report in details then both report showing different value of the item price.

SAP Business One,  Inventory audit report , Inventory in Warehouse report 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: Commission REST API Error
entry.content:
Hello @Ron_Hagan,

Since there is no specific information about the payload, I'll treat this as a scenario that is most often the case when we get this error while contracts are being used.

Request cannot skip the first or the last version since the range will be affected in this case and this is strictly forbidden for all api/v2 implementations. Modifying ranges in-between the initial range is expected, and you can modify it as much as you want, you just CANNOT modify the initial range (the earliest start date and the latest end date)

Eg.
Contract has 3 versions:
01-01-2021 - 01-01-2022
01-01-2022 - 01-01.2023
01.01-2023 - 01-01-2150

Initial and global range for this Contract here would be 01-01-2021 to 01-01-2150. While modifying this Contract you can alter it however you want as long as you’re in that global range. Request cannot have a date that is before 01-01-2021 or after 01-01-2150 and BOTH of them have to be inside that POST request (they cannot be skipped).

Another thing to note, request cannot have any date range gaps when sending a POST request to api/v2 as the user will get an error since the application wouldn’t know exactly how to modify the existing versions.

With PUT request you can just send the specific, only modified, version. So, the request don’t need to have every possible version of the Contract.

entry.title: Re: Extensibility Approaches in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
@sandeep_yashwantdixit 

Please refer this link for Development in the ABAP Environment | SAP Help Portal. Also Create Custom CDS Views is a Fiori app ithrough which one can create new custom CDS views by selecting a primary data source, adding associated data sources, and modifying field properties (annotations) in context of Extensibility.

entry.title: Re: Signavio Process Insights : Switching Kernels
entry.content:
Hi saurabhrana, 

Thank you for your question. This answer assumes that with "kernel" you are referring to “available connection”.

In SAP Signavio Process Insights you can register/unregister any of the supported SAP on-premise systems (according to our documentation) up to the number covered in your plan at any time. The collected data is kept in SAP Signavio Process Insights (and needs to be deleted separately if not needed any more). An unregistered system can be connected later again, but data collection will only cover the point of reconnection and ongoing data collection. Data collected in the past (if not deleted) should be still available, but there will be a gap in the time range where no connection was established.

Best regards,

Katie

entry.title: Re: Remove data inconsistency in Release status caused while Purchase Order / Purchase Requisition w
entry.content:
Hi Nagaraj,

Thanks for your response.For these kind of cases generally the root cause of the inconsistency is unknown and the issue occurs rarely,say 1-2 documents in a long span of time.The data can also be rectified by a custom report created based on the approach above,if manual update has to be avoided.

entry.title: SPAU in Entwicklungs-Abnahme- und Produktion unterschiedlich
entry.content:
Hallo Experten,

ich habe ein Problem mit der SPAU. Im Zuge der HANA-Migration, angefangen mit der Entwicklungsmaschine, haben wir festgestellt, das dort seit ca. 20 Jahren nie ein SPAU gemacht worden ist. Auf der Entwicklung konnten wir im Md.000 den SPAU durchführen, indem wir das Meiste AUF Original zurückgesetzt haben. Die entsprechenden Transporte sind dann auch anstandslos in die Abnahme gelaufen. Dennoch sind viele Objekte auf der Abnahme/Produktion nicht abgeglichen; stehen auf roter bzw. gelber Ampel. Die Transportaufträge dazu sind bei vielen auch nicht mehr bekannt, so dass man nicht nachschauen kann, was transportiert wurde. 

Frage: was können wir tun, um die SPAU auf der Abnahme/Produktion zu säubern, ohne ggf. das System aufzumachen? Gibt es ggf. Tabellen, z.B. die SMODILOG, wo wir ein Kennzeichen herausnehmen können, damit die offenen Objekte in der SPAU nicht mehr zu sehen sind?

Vielen Dank! Andrea

entry.title: Business email creation in AD to SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi AD and SF Experts,

I recently worked on a project aimed at generating business email addresses and usernames in Active Directory, with the intention of sending this information back to SuccessFactors.

However, we discovered that while generating usernames was possible, creating business email addresses was not. We could only update existing business email addresses from AD to SF. From what I’ve read, it seems that AD-SF integration does not support the creation of email addresses.

So, I’m curious—what do your customers typically do in this situation? It seems like automatically generating business email addresses is a common practice. HR shouldn’t have to manually enter this information during the hiring process.

Best regards,
Ines

entry.title: Follow on material is not planned in MRP live
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

I have the below issue when trying to plan follow on material with MRP live.

Below are the details of my scenario:

1. Material to be discontinued set up as per below in the material master:

2.  Follow on material is added to the BOM as per below:

- Follow on material is added as a new item:

- Discontinuation is set up for phase out material as below:

- Discontinuation data is set up for the follow on material as below:

3. Dependent requirement (sales order) is created for the header material:

4. Run MRP live with the below settings:

5. Planned order created for the header material, and also purchase requisition for the discontinued material but not preq-s for the follow on material.

- planned orders for the header material:

- Preq for the discontinued material

- No preq for the follow on material:

I already checked the following:

- /n/SAPAPO/RRPLOG1 --> No log found

- MD_MRP_PERFLOG --> No error:

- MD_MRP_FORCE_CLASSIC --> It says it is successfully planned

- It works with MD02 and both discontinued & follow on materials are planned correctly

- If I deactivate advanced planning for the follow-up material it also works with MRP live

I would appreciate it if you could provide some help on the root cause.

I really appreciate any help you can provide.

Br David

entry.title: Customizing component availability check for PP Planning Procedure 1 (Manual with Check)
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

This is in reference to availability check of the components during PP run with Planning Procedure 1(manual with check). While creating the order for finished goods, with Planning Procedure 1, the system checks for the component availability with the existing receipts like Planned orders, Purchase requisition and Schedule agreement. 

We have a requirement where we need to add additional receipt elements during this availability check, say for example adding STO's, confirmed PO etc., so that system will not ignore these receipts and consider them during the availability check and plan the FERT product accordingly during PP run.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Enabling Web Assistant
entry.content: This is the URL now. https://qa-s4.sap.dai.com:44300/flp?help-editor=true/sap-client=200#Shell-home. I still can't see the editor pencil.

entry.title: Start Your scripting Journey The Easy Way With SAP Analytics Cloud | Part Three
entry.content:
The Journey

I've been using SAP Analytics Cloud for almost 8 years and like many of you, have stuck to stories rather than Analytic Applications as I don't have a massive coding background. Well if truth be told, I'm old and so my Basic and Pascal skills haven't had an airing for quite a few years.

With the latest innovations such as the Optimised Design Experience and the ability to add script elements to existing stories, I have now started to 'enhance' my visual storytelling. It struck me that rather than go big bang I would take an existing SAC Story and add code where I could get some quick wins without having to write big chunks of code. Links to Part One and Part Two of my series are included to make life easy for those of you who've not yet read them.

So for this instalment we have to thank a customer who recently asked me "how do I reset a story to its initial state using scripting?". That got me thinking because there is no script method to 'reset' a story to its initial state. There is no application.reset(); method so one will need to think a little outside the box.

Below is my take on a reset button that when pushed will reset the whole story to its initial state and if you've seen my blogs before you'll know I try to keep code to a minimum.

Let's start by creating an optimised story in SAC such as the one illustrated below. It's pretty simple with 1 chart and 3 filters but yours can be as complicated as you choose - it won't affect the outcome.

We are actually going to be use bookmarks to achieve the reset, but we need to do some prep before we can add the code. Once you story is complete, we'll need to set some preferences within the story itself. Start by selecting the Story Settings > View Time Settings > Bookmarks option as shown below:

This is where you define what objects within a story are saved when you add a bookmark to a specific story. For this to work we will need all objects, filters, charts etc to be saved with the bookmark so that when we apply it everything is returned to the initial state of the story. The dialog box opens, and you need to check the All Components in the Story option.

Save, close and again Save your story. We now have a completed story and next we need to save a bookmark for the initial state. For this we simply View or Present the story and from the toolbar add a bookmark (Bookmark Current State) with the following settings selected.

You must make sure you select all three checkboxes, give it a name and click Save. Once this is done you can apply that very same bookmark using the same menuitem to open the Initial State bookmark.

Now the clever part because once you apply that bookmark the browser URL will change and look something like the following:

https://SAP_Tenant/sap/fpa/ui/tenants/c40d8/app.html#/story2&/s2/25D3E6803716B26B8EA76751785064F0/?bookmarkId=22305278-9717-4296-8809-298841349359&mode=view

Final step is to copy the part of the URL that's shown above in Blue and Bold and keep it safe for the final step. Close the story view tab and edit the original story. You need to add a button and button script to make this button reset the story when pushed. I like to remove the button text, add a tooltip and add an icon to the button before adding the script... something like this...

and this...

All that remains is to add some script to that button and you done - you know me by now - it's one line of code. You will notice that the bookmark argument is the same text we saved above from the URL and this is what the apply() function expects.

 

// Click the button to apply the bookmark saved in the previous step

Bookmarks.apply('22305278-9717-4296-8809-298841349359');

 

We're all done, you can now save the story and use as you wish. You can play with the filters, edit them, drill the chart but then push the button and the story will be reset to its initial state. #simples.

entry.title: Job Application Field Overrides
entry.content:
Job Application Field Overrides

 

Whenever Candidates want to apply for a job from a specific region or country, those candidates only want to be visible for some specific fields in the application, and we have to provide permissions country-wise in the Application template.

How it works: -

Ex: Every country has some restrictions or some details that need to be accepted while applying for the job. We have configured those details in the Application template in Recruiting Management.

This configuration will work for External applicants and internal applicants as well

How to configure in the Application Template.

  • We have configured the application fields in the template as per the Requirement.
  • Those fields as per Requirement we have to provide the Specific permissions for specific countries.
  • We need to enable the specific countries in the Provisioning.
  • This is the Application Override section as per country-wise.
  • We have two types of permissions that need to be granted for Candidate (Internal/External)
  • As per the below screenshot, there are three countries where candidates want to see the fields then the permissions follow as below.
  • Specific applicants can only see the defined fields for respective countries
  • After completed the configuration you can upload the template in Provisioning.

 

Example: -

The job Is posted for the India location the time the candidate tries to apply for the job the applicant can see those details in the applicant page like the below screenshot

 

 

Another Example:

If one country applicant needs to be filled or see some fields as per the Requirement that time we can have to give specific permission to those country applicants only.

 

 

Example: -

The Company posted the job in the USA that time the candidate was able to see the fields that we provided them.

 

 

 

External and Internal

  • If any specific fields need to be filled or visible for EXTERNAL AND INTERNAL then we can configure in the below format.          
  • Then these fields are visible for whichever you have provided the permissions for candidate applicants able to see the fields.

 

 

Conclusion: -

  • This is like in one umbrella many Faces see different locations means in one application template we can provide different field permissions for specific country applicants.
  • The recruiters are candidates who also do not confuse anything while applying for the job.
  • The recruiters also get all those details in the application status, and they can be able to complete the Recruiting process based on the fields.

Example: -

  • The in USA Country there is a specific opportunity for Disability or Ex-Servicemen candidates at that time the recruiter can be able to make the decision or process the application based on those candidate details.

entry.title: Access Jdbc Material while developing a Custom Adapter for SAP CPI
entry.content: I am currently developing a Custom adapter for the SAP CPI. Now I want to access an SQL-server over a Cloud Connector. I only found a guid how to access Tcp-Connections in general (Accessing On-Premise Application using Cloud Connector | SAP Help Portal). But using this would lose the capsulation provided by the Jdbc Material store. So, is there a way to access the Information stored in the Jdbc Material while developing a custom adapter?

entry.title: Re: Change value in fields MSEG-DMBTR and BSEG-DMBTR during GR posting in MIGO
entry.content: did you resolve this problem ???? I´ve same problem. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Exploring Data Access Control: Ensuring Consistency from SAC to Datasphere and Back - Blog 2
entry.content:
Hello,

In the results section for scenario 2 (import data from Datasphere to SAC via OData), it says the story accesses data directly from Datasphere but that's not the case since we are creating a SAC model in which we import Datasphere data.

My experience is that DAC from Datasphere will only apply when actually importing data into the model based on the Datasphere DAC of the user that created the OData connection (not the one that executes the import and not the one that executes the story). It's then possible to apply SAC DAC on top of the SAC model for it to be applied in the story.

Regards

entry.title: SSO two domains, no trust, logon via logon group
entry.content:
Hi guys,

we are migrating to separate active directory and using SSO (with Secure Login Client).
So in future there will be two active directories with NO trust to be useful in SAP for SSO.
Wh did add both AD service user (SPN) to SPNEGO and adjusted for the relevant user the SNC parameter in SU01 + SAPUILandscape.xml entries
(for users/client in the new domain, old users/clients will be untouched).
So far everything is working good.

Only one problem:
When using logon with logongroup (messageserver) the SNC parameter for SAP GUI are placed automatically (due to snc/identity/as I assume?).
Every user is getting the value for old domain: "p:CN=SAP/Kerberos<SID>@OLDDOMAIN.COM".
But of course the new domain users do need the new parameter "p:CN=SAP/Kerberos<SID>@NEWDOMAIN.COM".

entry.title: Re: Configuring Different setting for the Same Asset Class in Different Companies
entry.content: Do those company share the same Chart of Accounts?

yes. Will be included in 2025 FPS 00 S/4HANA Cloud, private edition and on premise. This corresponds to SAP basis release 8.16. Official release info: What's New | SAP Help Portal

Hope this helps.

Best

Andrea

entry.title: Re: Embedded Analytics: SAP Analytics Cloud in SAP S/4HANA Cloud - The Link Collection
entry.content:
Hi,

Im currently using SAP Embedded Analytics, Cloud Edition, and trying to figure out how to perform the following:

Having an 'Input Parameter', how can one do an offset on that. For example, a user can pass in FiscalYear/Period, like 202406, the report will then also need to do a prior year same period for comparison. So, how would i be able to get 202306 by doing an offset based on the user input ?

Would be great if someone could provide some assistance. 

Thanks Kindly

entry.title: Re: India TCS Form 27EQ - Remmitance Challan Issue
entry.content: Thank you Axel for your reply,

entry.title: Last Evaluated Price Non-inventory item Formatted Search
entry.content:
Hi all,

sorry if I missed another post asking the same question but I couldn't find any:

I have some items which are non-inventory items and therefore have no Last Evaluated Price. In the general settings, we chose the Last Evaluated Price as base price for the Gross Profit calculation.

The specific items I am talking about are things like Transport Insurance or 3rd Party Handling Fees. These are simply costs charged to the customer in exactly the amount we encounter them. Hence, I'd like the Gross Profit to be precisely 0%.

Now the question: Is there a possibility to automatically use the LineTotal as GrossBuyPr but only for those specific items? I tried it with a Formatted Search but it didn't work:

SELECT CASE WHEN T0.ItemCode = '#transport' THEN T0.LineTotal ELSE T0.GrossBuyPr END as GrossBuyPr
FROM INV1 T0
WHERE T0.LineNum = $[INV1.LineNum] and T0.DocEntry = $[INV1.DocEntry]

Most thankful for any help!
